calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Sep-13-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
The following matters were heard: PES-18-302143 The Estate of Kuei-Shi Lei and PES-21-304152 The estate of Yu-Tien Lei.

Appearances: Alina Laguna appeared via zoom for and with Shancha Lei (administrator).

Discussion was held in regard to the 50% of interest in real property that is being held in the name of Kuei-Shi Lei, that it should be passed to her husband Shancha Lei the surviving spouse. Spousal property petition is taken under submission with the intent to grant. Petition for an order to confirm validity of trust is taken under submission. Status on close of estate is continued to November 22, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Saephan. Not reported.

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Aug-16-2023 Continued To Sep-13-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Alina Laguna appearing via zoom for Shancha Lei (petitioner).

Discussion was held in regard to transferring Mrs. Lei's 50% interest in the property into the estate and not the trust, that Mr. Lei only had 50% interest in the property, and that the will was done after Mrs. Lei passed away. Spousal Property Petition Is continued to September 13, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Cecilia Castellanos. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Not reported.
